FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Class Button

Namespace
FluentGpu.Controls
Assembly
FluentGpu.Controls.dll

The Button control: barebone behavior (clickable, hover/pressed, focusable) + a default Fluent style. Overrideable globally (AccentStyleOverride/StandardStyleOverride), per-instance (pass a Button.Style), or ad-hoc (chain modifiers). Defaults are sourced from WinUI 3 DefaultButtonStyle / AccentButtonStyle (microsoft-ui-xaml controls\dev\CommonStyles\Button_themeresources.xaml): ButtonPadding 11,5,11,6 (line 152); ControlCornerRadius 4 (line 168); ControlContentThemeFontSize 14; ButtonBorderThemeThickness 1 (lines 29/90/127); FocusVisualMargin −3 (line 167); BackgroundTransition 83ms (lines 173-175). WinUI Button has NO scale animation — its state storyboards swap Background/BorderBrush/Foreground only (Button_themeresources.xaml:176-229), so no Hover/PressScale here (removed at the Wave-1 parity pass). Keyboard: the engine arms a pressed visual on Space/Enter key-DOWN and clicks on key-UP — held keys never repeat, any other key cancels without firing (WinUI ButtonBaseKeyProcess.h; E2) — and draws the keyboard focus ring itself (E1) — nothing control-side. The pointer cursor stays the WinUI arrow (only HyperlinkButton shows a hand — dxaml\xcp\dxaml\lib\HyperLinkButton_Partial.cpp:32). partial so apps/framework can add variants.

public static class Button

Fields

AccentStyleOverride

Set to globally replace the accent-button default style.

public static Button.Style? AccentStyleOverride

Field Value

Button.Style

PartLabel

The label run — a TextEl, so customize via parts.Set<TextEl>(Button.PartLabel, …). Owned: none (the P2 foreground ramp is style-driven and a modifier may override it).

public const string PartLabel = "Label"

Field Value

string

PartRoot

The button chrome (the WinUI ContentPresenter root). Owned: OnClick, Role, Children (the label slot).

public const string PartRoot = "Root"

Field Value

string

StandardStyleOverride

Set to globally replace the standard-button default style.

public static Button.Style? StandardStyleOverride

Field Value

Button.Style

Button.Style

Methods

Accent(string, Action, Style?, bool, TemplateParts?)

An accent (primary) button. Override the look by passing a Button.Style; restyle internals via parts (see TemplateParts and the PartXxx consts).

public static BoxEl Accent(string label, Action onClick, Button.Style? style = null, bool isEnabled = true, TemplateParts? parts = null)

Parameters

label string
onClick Action
style Button.Style
isEnabled bool
parts TemplateParts

Returns

BoxEl

Standard(string, Action, Style?, bool, TemplateParts?)

A neutral (standard) button.

public static BoxEl Standard(string label, Action onClick, Button.Style? style = null, bool isEnabled = true, TemplateParts? parts = null)

Parameters

label string
onClick Action
style Button.Style
isEnabled bool
parts TemplateParts

Returns

BoxEl
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
